name: minimal_check_small
description: Tiny crisp dark checkmark on white with a hairline grey stroke — tests the render-each-small rule below 32px.

expect.qualitative: White background, dark (#111827) checkmark glyph still clearly readable at 16px. Hairline #E5E7EB stroke around the rounded square at 32px. Both sizes must be rendered NATIVELY, not downsampled — no glyph blur.
